Title: Big tech engineers need big egos
Description: It’s a common position among software engineers that big egos have no place in tech1. This is understandable - we’ve all worked with some insufferably overconfident engineers who needed their egos checked - but I don’t think it’s correct. In fact, I don’t know if it’s possible to survive as a software engineer in a large tech company without some kind of big ego.
